title.description: Yaca ni app e vakaraitaki ena header. Na app ni raica ni ivakamacala ni kakana ni vuravura.

subtitle.text: Raica na ivakamacala mai na veivanua kece e vuravura
subtitle.description: Tagline e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni yaca ni app ena header.

heroTitle.description: Ulutaga levu ena tabana hero ni mataveilawa.

heroSubtitle.text: Raica na ivakamacala dina mai na loma ni vale ni kakana e vuravura taucoko
heroSubtitle.description: Ulutaga loma e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni ulutaga hero ena mataveilawa.

featuredTitle.description: Ulutaga ni tabana e vakaraitaki ena ruku ni kaadi ni ivakamacala.

cookingTime.description: Ulutaga ni gauna ni vakakokoroi ena kaadi ni ivakamacala. {minutes} e vakacurumi ena iwiliwili ni miniti.

difficulty.description: Ulutaga e vakaraitaki ena matamata ni levu ni dredre ena kaadi ni ivakamacala.

easy.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e rawarawa.

medium.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e dredre vakatabakidua.

hard.description: Ulutaga ni levu ni dredre e vakaraitaka na ivakamacala e dredre.

ramenName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Vakamamare ni mamu ni pua ni kena yacova na chashu malumu, qio malumu ni koro, kei na noodles vou.
ramenDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Margherita Pizza.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza Neapolitan e dau kilai vakalevu ena tomati San Marzano, mozzarella vou, kei na basil.
margheritaDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Margherita Pizza.

tacosName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos ni pua e marinated vata kei na pineapple, cilantro, kei na ulu ni wai vavalagi ena tortillas ni koro.
tacosDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Butter Chicken.

butterChickenDescription.text: Kikokiko malumu ena sauce tomato kei na suka, vata kei na manumanu ni kakana ni veisautaki ni manumanu.
butterChickenDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Butter Chicken.

padThaiName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Rice noodles e vakakokoroi vata kei na shrimp, tofu, peanuts, kei na sauce ni tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Yaca ni ivakamacala ni French Crepes.

crepesDescription.text: Crepes lailai, malumalumu e vakayagataki kina Nutella, strawberries vou, kei na kirim cream.
crepesDescription.description: Vakasama ni ivakamacala ni French Crepes.

label.description: Ulutaga e rawa ni raica na tamata ena dropdown ni veisau ni vosa ena header.

en.description: Vosa vakavalagi ena veisau ni vosa.

ja.description: Vosa vakaJapenese ena veisau ni vosa.

es.description: Vosa vakaSepania ena veisau ni vosa.
